# Governance Metrics Checklist

- Verify all required catalogs are current and lane-mapped.
- Confirm latest skill review outcomes and unresolved advisories.
- Confirm latest customization validation findings and dispositions.
- Publish a consolidated health disposition with explicit risk levels.
- Include a Report Navigation Grid with Level 1 (Executive), Level 2 (Type), and Level 3 (Item) drill-down links.
- Include Aggregate Metrics and Coverage grids in every full-workspace report.
- Include Failure Detail Grid with one row per open failure, or explicit `None` row with closure evidence.
- Include standardized Delta vs Prior Report grid with `Prior`, `Current`, `Delta`, `Trend` (Increase/Decrease/Flat).
- Include Docs Corpus Hygiene metrics (file count, redundancy candidates, stale candidates, navigation integrity).
- Ensure ranked recommendations map to specific failure IDs and target artifacts.
